details: The agent navigated to the correct GitHub issues page, used browser automation tools to extract real data, reported 820 open issues (in the hundreds as expected), and provided 5 specific technical issue titles with issue numbers. The titles are clearly real GitHub issues (specific, technical content). The 4th issue having a title of just 'Bug:' is plausible as an actual incomplete issue title, and the agent correctly navigated to that issue to verify it.
